title: ホープフルSの後に・結果は上々！

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I did it! Yeah! I did it, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Waaagh! Thanks so muuuch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is a great result for a G1 race. It bodes well
for the Japanese Derby!
choice_data_list: Let's keep working hard into the Classics!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
YESSS! Next year's gonna be the best year ever!
Promise!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket's enthusiasm is so infectious, I feel
ready to suggest a plan for next year on the spot,
but just then...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Can you, like, maybe chill a little while you're in
the tunnel?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: TAISHIIIN! HAYAHIDEEE!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Well done, Ticket. That was a good race.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Why, when you made that last dash for the
finishing line, I think Taishin actually stopped
breathing.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I-I did not!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, you're such a great friend! That's REAL
friendship! THANKS, TAISHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Geez, just stop yelling already!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
In any case, I'm glad you placed well. Next year
should be interesting.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It'll be the Japanese Derby at last! Let's all
try really hard there!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Indeed. I won't hand you the victory that easily.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Same here.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
All riiight! Let's give it all we've got for the
Japanese Derby! YEAH!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: We'll probably race each other before that.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh? Really?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What about the Classic Triple Crown? You have
your eyes on it too, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Classic Triple Crown—a prestigious
achievement requiring a racer to win all three of
the Satsuki Sho, the Japanese Derby, and the
Kikuka Sho. It's one of the highest honors in
racing!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The Triple Crown! R-right! Actually, I wasn't
thinking about anything but the Derby...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Seriously?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is the perfect chance to tell her the plan I
was about to suggest for next year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's been single-mindedly focused on the
Japanese Derby, but any racer worthy of the
Derby deserves to prove herself in the Satsuki
Sho as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It'll help her get used to running in the big Classic
races too, so the Satsuki Sho should definitely be
on our agenda.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In which case, our first step should be one of the
preliminaries leading up to that race...
choice_data_list: How about entering the Yayoi Sho?
How about entering the Yayoi Sho?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: The Yayoi Sho...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Winning Ticket whispers those words, Narita
Taishin visibly tenses up.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Then that'll be where we face off.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Are you entering too?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I won't go easy on you, got it?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I don't care who I'm up against—I'll be finishing
first.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! You said it! I'm all fired up now! LET'S
GO, YAYOI SHO!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So with that settled, we begin practicing in
earnest for our next goal!
